item.title: Shota Takahashi | Publications
item.description: Publications Refereed Papers in Journals Conferences Refereed Papers in Journals S. Takahashi, M. Tanaka, and S. Ikeda: Blind deconvolution with non-smooth regularization via Bregman proximal DCAs, Signal Processing, 202 (2023), 108734. S. Takahashi, M. Fukuda, and M. Tanaka: New Bregman proximal type algorithms for solving DC optimization problems, Computational Optimization and Applications, 83 (2022), 893–931. [codes] Conferences S. Takahashi: Bregman proximal DC algorithms and their application to blind deconvolution with nonsmooth regularization,

item.title: Shota Takahashi | CV
item.description: Current Vitae Employment Apr. 2023–Present Research Associate, Graduate School of Information Science and Technology, The University of Tokyo Apr. 2020–Jun. 2020 Work for a private company. Education Oct. 2020–Mar. 2023 Department of Statistical Science, School of Multidisciplinary Sciences, The Graduate University for Advanced Studies, SOKENDAI Doctor of Philosophy Apr. 2018–Mar. 2020 Department of Mathematical and Computing Science, School of Computing, Tokyo Institute of Technology Master of Science Apr. 2014–Mar. 2018 Department of Information Science, School of Science,
